modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to log into DegreeWorks due to access error

full_description_text:  
I am trying to log into DegreeWorks, but I keep getting an error message. It says there was an unexpected error with a status of 500 and that I do not have permission to access the Dashboard. This is preventing me from using the system as needed.
short_description: Unable to log into DegreeWorks due to access error
description: I am trying to log into DegreeWorks, but I keep getting an error message. It says there was an unexpected error with a status of 500 and that I do not have permission to access the Dashboard. This is preventing me from using the system as needed.
